BypassCorridorOption.description:
BypassCorridorOption is a single enriched bypass corridor for the Route Explorer UI.
 Includes coordinate endpoints so the client can call MapContainer.setBypassRoutes
 directly without any client-side geometry lookup.

bypassWarRiskTier.description:
*
 War risk tier derived from Lloyd's JWC Listed Areas + OSINT threat classification.
 This is a FREE field (no PRO gate) — it exposes the existing server-internal
 threatLevel from ChokepointConfig, making it available to clients for badges
 and bypass corridor scoring.

ChokepointExposureEntry.description: ChokepointExposureEntry holds per-chokepoint exposure data for a country.

chokepointId.description: Canonical chokepoint ID from the chokepoint registry.

coastSide.description: Which ocean/basin side the country's ports face (atlantic, pacific, indian, med, multi, landlocked).

exposureScore.description: Exposure score 0–100; higher = more dependent on this chokepoint.

shockSupported.description: Whether the shock model is supported for this chokepoint + hs2 combination.

warRiskTier.description:
*
 War risk tier derived from Lloyd's JWC Listed Areas + OSINT threat classification.
 This is a FREE field (no PRO gate) — it exposes the existing server-internal
 threatLevel from ChokepointConfig, making it available to clients for badges
 and bypass corridor scoring.

assetId.description: Maps to a pipeline or storage-facility id seeded elsewhere.

items.description:
Countries touched by the referenced asset (pipeline: fromCountry +
 toCountry + transitCountries; storage: country). Denormalised at seed
 time so CountryDeepDivePanel can filter events without a second RPC.
 Always non-empty in well-formed payloads; empty only if the upstream
 asset was removed without an event update. Per plan §R/#5 decision B.

endAt.description: Empty string when event is still ongoing.

Error.description: Error is returned when a handler encounters an error. It contains a simple error message that the developer can customize.

message.description: Error message (e.g., 'user not found', 'database connection failed')

FieldViolation.description: FieldViolation describes a single validation error for a specific field.

description.description: Human-readable description of the validation violation (e.g., 'must be a valid email address', 'required field missing')

field.description: The field path that failed validation (e.g., 'user.email' for nested fields). For header validation, this will be the header name (e.g., 'X-API-Key')

items.description:
Contributing root causes, ordered primary-first. Subset of:
   "upstream_refinery" | "logistics" | "policy" | "chokepoint" |
   "sanction" | "war" | "import_cut"

resolvedAt.description: Empty string when not yet resolved.

severity.description: One of: "confirmed" | "watch"  (classifier output — not a client-side derivation)

firstRegulatorConfirmation.description:
ISO date of the first regulator confirmation, if any. Empty when
 severity is "watch" on press-only signal.

primaryChokepointWarRiskTier.description:
*
 War risk tier derived from Lloyd's JWC Listed Areas + OSINT threat classification.
 This is a FREE field (no PRO gate) — it exposes the existing server-internal
 threatLevel from ChokepointConfig, making it available to clients for badges
 and bypass corridor scoring.

GetChokepointHistoryRequest.description:
GetChokepointHistory returns the transit-count history for a single
 chokepoint. Loaded lazily on card expand so the main chokepoint-status
 response can stay compact (no 180-day history per chokepoint).

GetCountryChokepointIndexRequest.description: GetCountryChokepointIndexRequest specifies the country and optional HS2 chapter.

hs2.description: HS2 chapter (2-digit string). Defaults to "27" (energy/mineral fuels) when absent.

GetCountryChokepointIndexResponse.description: GetCountryChokepointIndexResponse returns exposure scores for all relevant chokepoints.

fetchedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when this data was last seeded.

hs2.description: HS2 chapter used for the computation.

iso2.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code echoed from the request.

primaryChokepointId.description: Canonical ID of the chokepoint with the highest exposure score.

vulnerabilityIndex.description: Composite vulnerability index 0–100 (weighted sum of top-3 exposures).

coverageDays.description: Energy stockpile coverage in days (IEA data, HS 27 only; 0 for non-energy sectors or net exporters)

hasEnergyModel.description: Whether supply_deficit_pct and coverage_days are modelled (true) or unavailable (false)

supplyDeficitPct.description: Average refined-product supply deficit % under full closure (Gasoline/Diesel/Jet fuel/LPG average; HS 27 only)

warRiskPremiumBps.description: War risk insurance premium in basis points for this chokepoint

warRiskTier.description:
*
 War risk tier derived from Lloyd's JWC Listed Areas + OSINT threat classification.
 This is a FREE field (no PRO gate) — it exposes the existing server-internal
 threatLevel from ChokepointConfig, making it available to clients for badges
 and bypass corridor scoring.

fetchedAt.description: ISO timestamp from the seeded payload (empty when no data is cached).

GetFuelShortageDetailRequest.description:
GetFuelShortageDetail returns a single shortage with full evidence
 bundle + citation timeline. Loaded lazily on drawer open.

closureDays.description: Closure-window duration in days. Server clamps to [1, 365]. Defaults to 30.

totalAddedCost.description: Sum of total_cost_shock across all sectors.

unavailableReason.description: Populated when no seeded import data is available for the country.

warRiskTier.description:
*
 War risk tier derived from Lloyd's JWC Listed Areas + OSINT threat classification.
 This is a FREE field (no PRO gate) — it exposes the existing server-internal
 threatLevel from ChokepointConfig, making it available to clients for badges
 and bypass corridor scoring.

GetPipelineDetailRequest.description:
GetPipelineDetail returns a single pipeline with its full evidence bundle.
 Evidence surface here is richer than ListPipelinesResponse — the list view
 is designed for the map layer's compact shape; detail is designed for the
 click-through drawer.

cargoType.description: One of: container, tanker, bulk, roro

noModeledLane.description:
True when the wrapper fell back to the origin's first route (no shared route
 between origin and destination clusters). Signals "no modeled lane" to the UI.

primaryRouteId.description: Primary trade route ID from TRADE_ROUTES config. Empty when no modeled lane.

items.description: DependencyFlag classifies how a country+sector dependency can fail.
DependencyFlag classifies how a country+sector dependency can fail.

hasViableBypass.description: Whether at least one viable bypass corridor exists for the primary chokepoint.

primaryChokepointExposure.description: Exposure score for the primary chokepoint (0–100).

primaryChokepointId.description: Chokepoint ID with the highest exposure score for this country+sector.

primaryExporterIso2.description: ISO2 of the country supplying the largest share of this sector's imports.

primaryExporterShare.description: Share of imports from the primary exporter (0–1). 0 = no Comtrade data available.

fetchedAt.description: Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

upstreamUnavailable.description: Set to true when upstream data source is unavailable and cached data is stale.

GetStorageFacilityDetailRequest.description:
GetStorageFacilityDetail returns a single facility with its full evidence
 bundle + revision log. Revisions land in Week 3 alongside the disruption
 event log (Week 3 milestone — empty array in v1).

ListEnergyDisruptionsRequest.description:
ListEnergyDisruptions returns the energy disruption event log — state
 transitions for pipelines and storage facilities (sabotage, sanction,
 maintenance, mechanical, weather, commercial, war). Each event ties
 back to an assetId seeded by the pipeline or storage registry, so the
 panel drawer can render an asset-scoped timeline without a second RPC.

 Seeded from a curated JSON file (scripts/data/energy-disruptions.json).
 An automated state-transition classifier was scoped but not shipped —
 the log is curated-only today.

 See docs/methodology/disruptions.mdx.

assetId.description:
Filter to one asset. Omit for all. When set, also narrows to the
 matching asset_type if provided.

assetType.description: Filter to one asset type. Accepts: "pipeline" | "storage".

ongoingOnly.description: If true, only return events with endAt empty (still ongoing).

ListFuelShortagesRequest.description:
ListFuelShortages returns the global fuel-shortage alert registry.
 Seeded from a curated JSON file (scripts/data/fuel-shortages.json).
 An LLM classifier extension was scoped but not shipped — the registry
 is curated-only today. Severity ("confirmed" or "watch") is a row
 field authored at curation time; the evidence is shipped alongside
 so agents and humans can audit the grounds for a severity label.

 See docs/methodology/shortages.mdx for the evidence-threshold spec.

country.description: Filter to one ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country. Omit for global.

product.description:
Filter to one product. Accepts: "petrol" | "diesel" | "jet" | "heating_oil".
 Omit for all products.

severity.description: Filter to one severity. Accepts: "confirmed" | "watch". Omit for both.

ListPipelinesRequest.description:
ListPipelines returns the full oil and/or gas pipeline registry with
 evidence-based status per asset. Registry is curated (see
 docs/methodology/pipelines.mdx) and refreshed weekly by
 scripts/seed-pipelines-{gas,oil}.mjs. Typical consumer: PipelineStatusPanel
 rendering the DeckGL PathLayer.

 The public badge is DERIVED from the evidence bundle server-side at
 read time — callers MUST use `public_badge` for display, not invent
 their own derivation from `evidence` fields. This keeps the atlas and
 MCP clients consistent and versioned together.

commodityType.description: Filter to one commodity. Omit (or pass empty) to receive both.

ListStorageFacilitiesRequest.description:
ListStorageFacilities returns the curated strategic storage registry
 (underground gas storage, strategic petroleum reserves, LNG terminals,
 crude tank farms) with evidence-based status per asset. Registry is
 curated (see docs/methodology/storage.mdx) and refreshed weekly by
 scripts/seed-storage-facilities.mjs. Typical consumer:
 StorageFacilityMapPanel rendering the DeckGL ScatterplotLayer.

 Like pipelines, the public badge is DERIVED from the evidence bundle
 server-side at read time. Callers MUST use `public_badge` for display
 rather than inventing their own derivation from `evidence` fields, so
 the atlas and MCP clients stay consistent and versioned together.

facilityType.description:
Filter to one facility type. Accepts:
   "ugs" | "spr" | "lng_export" | "lng_import" | "crude_tank_farm"
 Omit (or pass empty) to receive all types.

closureDays.description: Echoes the clamped closure duration used for total_cost_shock (1-365).

freightAddedPctPerTon.description: Bypass-corridor freight uplift fraction (0.10 == +10% per ton).

hs2.description: HS2 chapter code (e.g. "27" mineral fuels, "85" electronics).

importValueAnnual.description: Total annual import value (USD) for this sector.

totalCostShock.description: Cost for the requested closure_days window.

warRiskPremiumBps.description: War-risk insurance premium (basis points) sourced from the chokepoint tier.

NumberRange.description: Inclusive integer range for transit days / freight USD estimates.

ShippingStressCarrier.description: ShippingStressCarrier represents market stress data for a carrier or shipping index.

fillDisclosed.description:
Whether working-gas / stock-level fill is publicly disclosed for this
 asset. LNG export terminals, for instance, tend NOT to disclose; UGS
 sites in Europe are required to disclose via GIE AGSI+.

fillSource.description:
Source of the disclosed fill series ("GIE AGSI+", "EIA SPR weekly
 stock report", etc.). Empty when fill_disclosed=false.

capacityTwh.description:
Working capacity in the facility's native unit (see working_capacity_unit).
 Exactly ONE of these is populated per facility, chosen by facility_type:
   ugs                              → capacity_twh
   spr, crude_tank_farm             → capacity_mb
   lng_export, lng_import           → capacity_mtpa

dataAvailable.description:
False when the upstream portwatch/relay source did not return data for
 this chokepoint in the current cycle — the summary fields are zero-state
 fill, not a genuine "zero traffic" reading. Client should render a
 "transit data unavailable" indicator and skip stat/chart rendering.

ValidationError.description: ValidationError is returned when request validation fails. It contains a list of field violations describing what went wrong.

get.description: GetBypassOptions returns ranked bypass corridors for a chokepoint. PRO-gated.

GetChokepointHistory returns transit-count history for a single chokepoint,
 loaded lazily on card expand. Keeps the status RPC compact (no 180-day
 history per chokepoint on every call).
GetCountryChokepointIndex returns per-chokepoint exposure scores for a country. PRO-gated.

parameters.description: HS2 chapter (2-digit string). Defaults to "27" (energy/mineral fuels) when absent.
parameters.name: hs2

get.description: GetCountryCostShock returns cost shock and war risk data for a country+chokepoint. PRO-gated.
GetCountryProducts returns the seeded bilateral-HS4 import basket for a country. PRO-gated.

GetFuelShortageDetail returns a single shortage with full evidence
 bundle and citation timeline. Loaded lazily on drawer open.

GetMultiSectorCostShock returns per-sector cost-shock estimates for a
 country+chokepoint+closure-window. PRO-gated.

parameters.description: Closure-window duration in days. Server clamps to [1, 365]. Defaults to 30.
parameters.name: closureDays

get.description:
GetPipelineDetail returns a single pipeline with full evidence bundle
 + auto-revision-log entries. Loaded lazily on drawer open.

GetRouteExplorerLane returns the primary maritime route, chokepoint exposures,
 bypass options with geometry, war risk, and static transit/freight estimates for
 a country pair + HS2 + cargo type. PRO-gated. Wraps the route-intelligence vendor
 endpoint's compute with browser-callable auth and adds fields needed by the
 Route Explorer UI.

parameters.description: One of: container, tanker, bulk, roro
parameters.name: cargoType

get.description: GetSectorDependency returns dependency flags and risk profile for a country+HS2 sector. PRO-gated.
GetShippingStress returns carrier market data and a composite stress index.

GetStorageFacilityDetail returns a single facility with full evidence
 bundle + revision log. Loaded lazily on drawer open.

ListEnergyDisruptions returns the disruption event log for pipelines
 and storage facilities. Supports per-asset or per-asset-type filtering
 so panel drawers can fetch a scoped timeline without pulling the
 full registry.

parameters.description:
Filter to one asset. Omit for all. When set, also narrows to the
 matching asset_type if provided.
parameters.name: assetId

parameters.description: Filter to one asset type. Accepts: "pipeline" | "storage".
parameters.name: assetType

parameters.description: If true, only return events with endAt empty (still ongoing).
parameters.name: ongoingOnly

get.description:
ListFuelShortages returns the global fuel-shortage alert registry.
 Curated-only: severity ("confirmed" | "watch") is a row field authored
 at curation time, not a client-side derivation. Free tier.

parameters.description: Filter to one ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country. Omit for global.
parameters.name: country

parameters.description:
Filter to one product. Accepts: "petrol" | "diesel" | "jet" | "heating_oil".
 Omit for all products.
parameters.name: product

parameters.description: Filter to one severity. Accepts: "confirmed" | "watch". Omit for both.
parameters.name: severity

get.description:
ListPipelines returns the curated oil & gas pipeline registry for the
 Energy Atlas PathLayer. Public badges are DERIVED from evidence bundles
 server-side and versioned (classifier_version). Free-tier; see
 docs/methodology/pipelines.mdx for data + classifier spec.

parameters.description: Filter to one commodity. Omit (or pass empty) to receive both.
parameters.name: commodityType

get.description:
ListStorageFacilities returns the curated strategic storage registry
 (UGS + SPR + LNG + crude tank farms) for the Energy Atlas DeckGL
 ScatterplotLayer. Public badges are DERIVED from evidence bundles
 server-side and versioned (classifier_version). Free-tier; see
 docs/methodology/storage.mdx.

parameters.description:
Filter to one facility type. Accepts:
   "ugs" | "spr" | "lng_export" | "lng_import" | "crude_tank_farm"
 Omit (or pass empty) to receive all types.
parameters.name: facilityType
